message:
fix: Parameter shadowing, unused closures, and unused params

- Fix parameter shadowing in class methods:
  - Use wouldShadowMethodInClass() helper consistently across all init methods
  - Add isNameAssignedInInitBody() to detect when params shadow local vars
  - Add proper defer cleanup for var_renames in genInitMethod()

- Fix unused closure constants:
  - Add discard statements for __ClosureImpl_xxx and __CaptureType_xxx after definition

- Fix unused function parameters:
  - Remove anytype_params check in discard logic (params can be both anonymous and anytype)
  - Use isNameUsedInBodyExcludingSuperCalls to match signature generation logic
  - Properly handle classes without known parents where super() calls are stripped

All 7 original tests still pass.
